testimonials.quote: Before using Apple Cider Vinegar+, I would lose weight but gain it right back. Now that I have been taking this product once a day, I have had a steady loss of weight.
I was overweight by thirty pounds. I lost weight with this product and I decided to exercise. I feel much better and look much better too.
testimonials.result: Lost 30 pounds, feel and look better

testimonials.quote: This supplement helps me feel better with more energy. I really like all of your Products - they work for me, and I love that they are natural.
I needed to lose weight after developing circulation problems. I've already lost 15 pounds with exercise, diet, and this convenient pill.

I take a pill every morning and it helps suppress my appetite and make me feel fuller longer. I also like the fact that I am using vinegar every day. The tablets are easy to swallow and I don't have the strong aftereffects that I do after eating foods with vinegar.
Your ACV+ really helps - I have a lot more energy, and I don't feel hungry. My friends have noticed a difference in my appearance, and now they want to try it, too.

market_sophistication_indicators: Addresses convenience objection to drinking ACV
